title: OpenSEO connects real search data to AI agents through MCP
friendlyTitle: OpenSEO gives AI agents real search and competitor data
summary: OpenSEO launched an open-source SEO platform that combines keyword, competitor, backlink, rank-tracking, audit, and AI-visibility data. Its MCP integration lets agents such as Claude or Codex query those datasets and save results into a shared workspace, with hosted plans starting below the usual enterprise SEO-tool tier and a self-hosting option.
friendlySummary: OpenSEO is a lower-cost, open-source SEO tool. AI agents can use it to check keywords, rankings, links, competitors, and site problems instead of guessing.
whyItMatters: Marketing agents are much more useful when they can ground recommendations in current search data rather than inventing plausible keywords. The MCP approach also keeps the human-facing dashboard and the agent’s tools connected, making results easier to inspect before acting on them.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This can make AI marketing advice more accurate, while people can still review the real numbers before publishing anything.
